---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  feed: true
  fields: [image, title, date, categories]
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<div class="blog-header">
    <div class="blog-header-row">
        <div class="blog-header-title">Blog</div>
    </div>
    <div class="blog-filter-tabs">
        <button class="blog-filter-btn active" onclick="filterPosts('all', event)">全部文章</button>
        <button class="blog-filter-btn" onclick="filterPosts('單篇文章', event)">單篇文章</button>
        <button class="blog-filter-btn" onclick="filterPosts('系列文章', event)">系列文章</button>
    </div>
    <div class="blog-header-divider"></div>
</div>

<script>
// Move category tags from .body into .metadata (after the date)
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-post').forEach(function(post) {
        var cats = post.querySelector('.body .listing-categories');
        var meta = post.querySelector('.metadata');
        if (cats && meta) {
            // Append after the date link so order is: date -> tag
            meta.appendChild(cats);
            // Ensure the date link comes first visually via flex order
            var dateLink = meta.querySelector('a');
            if (dateLink) dateLink.style.order = '-1';
        }
    });
});

function filterPosts(category, event) {
    // Update active tab (pill highlight)
    document.querySelectorAll('.blog-filter-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
    event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');

    // Filter listing items by reading Quarto's data-categories attribute
    // Quarto encodes categories as: base64( encodeURIComponent(category) )
    // So atob() gives us "%E7%B3%BB%E5%88..." which we then decodeURIComponent()
    const items = document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-post');
    items.forEach(item => {
        if (category === 'all') {
            item.style.removeProperty('display');
        } else {
            const encodedCats = item.getAttribute('data-categories') || '';
            let match = false;
            if (encodedCats) {
                try {
                    const decoded = decodeURIComponent(window.atob(encodedCats));
                    match = decoded === category;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error("Category decode failed:", e);
                }
            }
            if (match) {
                item.style.removeProperty('display');
            } else {
                item.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important');
            }
        }
    });
}
</script>

```
